title: mentha stylosa
intro: Mentha stylosa, also known as Button Mint or Twiggy Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, characterized by its small white flowers and distinctive button-like shape. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mentha stylosa include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. Mentha stylosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical application, and is also used in culinary dishes and aromatherapy products.
